metadata.title: Marcelo Soares — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Marcelo Soares' portfolio — full stack developer based in Volta Redonda, Brazil. Projects, stack, and contact.

hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Node.js, PostgreSQL, and React every day. From API to UI.

about.heading: About
bio: I'm Marcelo, based in Volta Redonda, a small city in Rio de Janeiro state. I've been coding for a while, and what keeps me hooked is solving the whole problem — not just the UI, not just the API. I want to understand how things work end to end.
When I'm not coding, I'm usually studying, reading, or tinkering on a side project. I like things done well — code I can read six months from now — and I learn best by building.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects I built from scratch. Open source.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Got a role, a project, or just want to swap notes? Drop me a line.
